assertions.reason: A fresh `bun install --frozen-lockfile` exited 0, but the captured install log contained no `[postinstall]` lines for `@enbox/agent`, `enbox-user-agent`, or `react-native-leveldb`, so the required fresh-install postinstall log evidence was absent.

After fresh install, `dist/types/enbox-user-agent.d.ts` declared both `agentVault` and `vault` as `IdentityVault`, added a type-only `IdentityVault` import, and had no remaining `HdIdentityVault` typing on those fields.
After fresh install, `dist/esm/enbox-user-agent.js` still contained the default `new HdIdentityVault(...)` branch and the `VAULT_STORE` location string, preserving the ESM fallback path.

The patched declaration file used `import type { IdentityVault }`, `node --input-type=module -e "import('@enbox/agent')"` printed `OK`, and exact regex checks found no standalone runtime `IdentityVault` import/reference in the ESM file.

Following `rm -rf node_modules && bun install --frozen-lockfile`, the widened `IdentityVault` declarations and the preserved `new HdIdentityVault(...)` ESM fallback were both present in the freshly installed package.

After the fresh install, `react-native-leveldb/android/build.gradle` had no `buildscript` block and still included `google()`, while `cpp/leveldb/util/env_posix.cc` no longer contained `std::memory_order::memory_order_relaxed`.

frictions.description: The contract's suggested `grep -n "IdentityVault" $ESM_JS` for VAL-PATCH-007 also matches the valid `HdIdentityVault` symbol as a substring, so it cannot distinguish a real runtime `IdentityVault` import/reference from the preserved fallback.
frictions.resolution: Used exact regex checks (`\bIdentityVault\b` and an exact import/path guard) plus a real dynamic `import('@enbox/agent')` smoke check.

summary: Validated 6 assigned patch-install assertions on the local jest-local surface: 5 passed and 1 failed. The only failure was VAL-PATCH-001 because the fresh-install log showed no postinstall patch lines even though the patched files themselves were present after install.
